title: nf-schema example - params.input schema
description: Schema for the samplesheet provided with params.input for QC analysis

sample_id.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

status.errorMessage: Status must be provided and be one of 'tumor' or 'normal'

bam.errorMessage: Bam file must be provided for QC analysis

bai.errorMessage: Bam index file must be provided for QC analysis

seq_sum.errorMessage: Sequencing summary must be a txt file

adaptive.errorMessage: For adaptive sequencing workflow, bed file with target regions must be provided

allOf.description: At least a bam + bam.bai file OR a sequencing summary should be provided
If a bam is present, an indexed bai file should also be provided
If adaptive sampling was performed and a bed file is supplied, a bam + bam.bai entry must also be provided.
